description: Renovate replaces Dependabot: npm, github-actions, Dockerfiles, docker-compose. Disable Dependabot version updates in Settings → Code security and analysis. GitHub Dependabot vulnerability PRs already ignore global schedule; OSV is enabled for npm so more CVEs get fixes, also without schedule gating via packageRules.

packageRules.description: Group npm updates into one PR
Group GitHub Actions updates into one PR
Group Dockerfile image updates into one PR
Group docker-compose image updates into one PR
Pin Docker image digests for immutability and supply-chain compliance
Security/vuln fixes: not gated by global schedule, own PR, immediate branch/PR creation (overrides bulk groups above)
Automerge patch/minor security fixes when CI is green (majors still open as PRs)
